title: Geographic Coverage Areas
description: The geographic locations where the data refer or are related.

city.title: City
city.description: A town, city, or similar populated place covered in the data collection

county.title: County
county.description: A United States county or similar administrative area covered in the data collection

state.title: State
state.description: A state, province, canton or similar political entity covered in the data collection

country.title: Country
country.description: A country covered in the data collection

region.title: Region
region.description: An area distinguished by one or more observable physical or cultural characteristics that is covered in the data collection.

continent.title: Continent
continent.description: A continent covered in the data collection

other_area.title: Other Geographic Area
other_area.description: An area covered in the data collection that cannot be represented using the defined categories above or matched to an appropriate GeoNames record.
other_area.usageNotes: Use this for user-provided terms, loosely defined geographic concepts, GeoNames feature types not covered by city/county/state/country/region/continent, or historical geographic entities (e.g., Prussia) not represented in GeoNames.

uri.title: URI
uri.description: A local unique identifier for the geographic coverage area.

externalURI.title: External URI
externalURI.description: The GeoNames unique identifier for the geographic coverage area.

usageNotes: In addition to the total geographic scope of the data, may include any additional levels of geographic coding provided in the variables.
